name: Business Strategy
description: Core strategic decisions including pricing, scope freeze, club offering model, and key partnership locks required before launch.

actions.task: Schedule pricing decision session with Scott — must be decided by end of April
Schedule scope freeze meeting — agree exactly what is in and out at launch
Decide Option A vs Option B for club offering at launch
Lock Crystal Yeo — get contract signed this week
Initiate contact with Betsy McNally Laouar — US coach, addresses top strategic risk
Progress Rebecca Smith — US credibility + sports psych content
Review pessimistic scenario assumptions once Crystal Yeo is on board

ideas.text: Consider 3-tier pricing model at launch for marketing psychology
US market voice is the #2 strategic risk after content quality
